texto: When we search for "ourselves" in the eyes of others, we have imprisoned our own-selves in believing that our self-worth is nothing unless others validate who we are. Unless we approve of whom we are, what we are, and what we are capable of doing as an individual, only then we will have released "ourselves" from our own imprisonment. We are in charge of our own life's destiny and what we do and become can only be validated by our accomplishments and failures; not by what others may think of us.
explicacao: Citação de Dahveed sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “When we search for "ourselves" in the eyes of others, we have imprisoned our own-selves in believ…” articula reflexao, inspiracional, sabedoria em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e sabedoria.
